violations.text: Grab and Go pastry items served in the food establishment are lacking labels. Grab and good food items in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, and allergens. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door stand up and on the two door low boy. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has employees that are Serve Safe managers. They must apply with RIDOH to be Manager Certified in Food Safety with the RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2024
